name: HWM_CHANGE_EVENTS
description: The table stores records of changes made to specific objects (e.g., Absence, Assignment) as received from an Atom feed. It captures the details of each change event, including the type of object affected, the operation performed, and relevant metadata.

columns.Name: CHANGE_EVENT_ID
columns.Comments: A unique identifier of change event

columns.Name: CHANGE_EVENT_SET_ID
columns.Comments: References the change event set to which this change event belongs

columns.Name: OBJECT_TYPE
columns.Comments: The type of object which raises the event

columns.Name: OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the object whose change raised the event.

columns.Name: OPERATION
columns.Comments: Type of operation performed on the object

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_DATE
columns.Comments: Date when the event change became or will become effective.

columns.Name: CHANGE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the change event from the Atom response

columns.Name: CHANGE_CONTENT
columns.Comments: Summary of the atom feed entry content denoting the change event.

columns.Name: PUBLISHED_INSTANT
columns.Comments: Timestamp when the event change was published.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
